overall.summary: Overall score uses minimum dimension score 2 capped by highest severity CRITICAL.

proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: Proposal for the partial activation of Aave Governance v3 in an interim Aave Governance v2.5 version. It migrates Level 1 (Short) permissions to v3 Executors, funds a.DI, Aave Robot, and the Aave Gelato gas tank.

disclosed_entities.name: Aave Gelato gas tank
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Fund the Aave Gelato gas tank.

disclosed_entities.name: AAVE
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Upgrade of the AAVE, aAAVE and stkAAVE implementations. (Note: not included in this proposal compared to 345)

disclosed_entities.name: aAAVE
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Upgrade of the AAVE, aAAVE and stkAAVE implementations. (Note: not included in this proposal compared to 345)

disclosed_entities.name: stkAAVE
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Upgrade of the AAVE, aAAVE and stkAAVE implementations. (Note: not included in this proposal compared to 345)

claimed_actions.raw_action: Migrate all Level 1 (Short) permissions of the Aave ecosystem smart contracts from the v2 Executors to v3 Executors
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Transitions Level 1 (Short) permissions to v3 Executors
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: - Migrate all Level 1 (Short) permissions of the Aave ecosystem smart contracts from the v2 Executors to v3 Executors.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Fund the Aave Gelato gas tank
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Provides funding to the Aave Gelato gas tank
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: - Fund the Aave Gelato gas tank.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal deals with a partial migration to a new governance execution layer, migrating permissions across multiple networks and funding ecosystem components. Though described as a simplified interim version without complex voting assets, it still touches crucial ecosystem components.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Migrate all Level 1 (Short) permissions of the Aave ecosystem smart contracts from the v2 Executors to v3 Executors... Fund a.DI... Fund Aave Robot... Fund the Aave Gelato gas tank.

limitations: Smart contract addresses are not provided in the text, except via external github links.
Exact funding amounts and tokens are not explicitly detailed in the text.
List of contracts and detailed actions relies on an external link.

conflict_detection.summary: An undisclosed address participates in an uncovered critical business action.

findings.title: Unaccounted trace addresses
findings.description: One or more addresses appeared in the trace without direct proposal text disclosure.
findings.recommendation: Pause or escalate manual review because an uncovered critical business action is linked to an undisclosed address.

depth_analysis.summary: Observed trace depth exceeds claimed complexity.

findings.title: Trace complexity exceeds textual complexity disclosure
findings.description: Observed trace depth exceeds claimed complexity.
findings.recommendation: Review whether the proposal text should describe the actual call depth or indirect execution paths.
